description_long: This object consists of a group of six potted plants, each with distinct foliage and pot designs, arranged in a row. The plants vary in size and species, with some featuring broad, fan-like leaves, while others have slender, spiky, or bushy foliage. The pots are mostly cylindrical and elevated on minimalist metal stands, except for one smaller plant in a round, low pot without a stand. The color palette is dominated by various shades of green from the leaves, complemented by white and gray pots and metallic stands. The arrangement suggests a decorative, modern aesthetic suitable for urban environments. No visible plant identification labels or decorative patterns are present on the pots.
description: A group of six modern potted plants with diverse green foliage in white and gray pots, some elevated on metal stands. The arrangement is decorative and visually varied, suitable for urban interiors or exteriors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six potted plants in a row, highlighting the diversity in plant shapes and pot heights.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth and staggered heights of the plants, with foliage overlapping and the tallest plant at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the plants and pots, with the arrangement appearing more compact and the stands more visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the group, with the tallest and broadest-leafed plants most prominent.
attribute_pot_type: ceramic and plastic with metal stands
attribute_plant_species: mixed species (e.g., palm, dracaena, fern, ficus, aglaonema)
